description.p: You can make an Intelligence (Arcana) check as a bonus action while viewing a technique in play to understand how it works. The DC is equal to the user's Cursed Energy save DC.

When making this check, treat your Intelligence score as a 22. If you instead spend a full turn action (Action + Bonus Action + Movement) attempting to understand a technique, you have advantage on the check.

sheet.description: Make an Arcana check to understand how a technique works. The DC is equal to the user's Cursed Energy save DC. When making this check, treat your Intelligence score as a 22. If you instead spend a full turn action you have advantage on the check.

description.p: You have practiced techniques in melee combat against sorcerers, gaining the following benefits:

ul.li: When a creature within 10 feet of you uses Cursed Energy, you can use your reaction to make a melee weapon attack against that creature if they are within range.
You have advantage on saving throws against cursed techniques made by creatures within 15 feet of you.

sheet.description: When a creature within 10 feet of you uses CE, you can use your reaction to make a melee weapon attack against that creature if they are within range. You have advantage on saving throws against cursed techniques made by creatures within 15 feet of you.

element.name: Tool Maker
element.prerequisite: 16+ Cursed Energy score, Proficiency in Arcana

p.em: Prerequisite: 16+ Cursed Energy score, Proficiency in Arcana

description.p: You have the unique ability to create cursed tools. The time it takes to make a cursed tool depends on the rarity of the item, and the rarity of item you can make is dependent on your level and you can spend 8 hours per day working on a cursed tool. After creating a cursed tool, you must wait an amount of time equal to its crafting time before working on another cursed tool. The GM decides the cost of any materials.
Level 13-16: First Grade (Very Rare), Time: 1944 hours

sheet.description: You can make Fourth Grade cursed tools, spending up to 8 hours per day working on it.
You can make Third Grade cursed tools, spending up to 8 hours per day working on it.
You can make Second Grade cursed tools, spending up to 8 hours per day working on it.
You can make First Grade cursed tools, spending up to 8 hours per day working on it.
